---
title: "ED Fig 1b - 2D-culture pooled-replicate neurite-xcorr"
output: html_notebook
---

<!--
================================================================================
  WRAPPER for ED Fig 1b (2D culture, pooled-replicate CCF).
================================================================================
  This file's role: place the canonical analysis in the EDFig01_coordination
  directory so `Path_1 <- dirname(...)` resolves here, picking up the
  2D-culture per-cell CSV inputs (N = 101 from 4 independent experiments).

  Includes the canonical template:
      ../../templates/pooled_replicate_ccf.Rmd

  Manuscript panel:
      ED Fig 1b (occurrence of neurons with N extending neurites,
                  cross-correlation, 2D culture).

  Original G:\ source:
      G:/Figure S1_coordination/Fig. S1b/R_scripts/Neurite activity corr_comb.Rmd
      (_comb suffix = combined-replicate, i.e. pooled).

  Sibling that includes the same template (different data directory):
      figures/EDFig02_actin/edfig02c_neurite_actin_xcorr_pooled_sd.Rmd
      (ED Fig 2c; pooled-replicate CCF with SD envelope).

  Refactored 2026-05-12: prior 2341-line wrapper had a body byte-identical
  to its sibling; both moved to a shared canonical template.

  Essentiality: Essential.
-->

```{r child = "../../templates/pooled_replicate_ccf.Rmd"}
```
